PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-24-2026 Continued To Mar-24-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael C. Fallon for petitioner Ivan Diriangen Urbina (via Zoom).
Justin Hedemark for objectors Angelo Carmelo Colom-Urbina, Maria Del Carmen Colom-Urbina, and Marciano Enrique Urbina, who were also present.

The matter was called for hearing on Ivan Diriangen Urbina's Petition for Letters of Administration. The petition had previously been pre-granted. Mr. Hedemark appeared and objected, and advised the court that a competing petition had been filed and assigned a hearing date.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to March 24, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Continued To Feb-24-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
